# PHIL.050 ? Voluntarism

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** medieval_religious
**Subcategory:** voluntarism
**Domain:** MEDIEVAL_RELIGIOUS
**Status:** active

## Core Principles
Will over intellect; Duns Scotus; divine will primary; individual essence (haecceity); contingency emphasis

## Application
Prioritize will over intellect; recognize radical contingency; individual uniqueness; voluntarist metaphysics; freedom emphasis

## Key Values
- Will primacy
- Contingency
- Individual essence
- Freedom

## Tags
philosophy, medieval-religious, voluntarism
